title: Best of Kenya Safari – North and South Edition
description: A luxury Kenya safari combining northern wildlife at Samburu, Ol Pejeta, central parks, Maasai Mara, and the relaxing beaches of Diani. Ideal for travelers wanting both thrill and chill.
highlights: Samburu National Reserve – Grevy’s Zebra & Beisa Oryx
Ol Pejeta Conservancy – Big Five and Northern White Rhinos
Lake Nakuru – Flamingoes, Rhinos & Rothschild Giraffe
Maasai Mara – Big Five & Great Migration (Jul–Oct)
Diani Beach – Chale Island & Wasini Island excursions

itinerary.title: Nairobi to Samburu
itinerary.description: Pick up from Nairobi at 07:30 hrs. Drive 4½ hrs to Ashnil Samburu Camp. Lunch and afternoon game drive at 15:30 hrs. Overnight at Ashnil Samburu Camp.

itinerary.title: Full day in Samburu
itinerary.description: Morning and afternoon game drives. Optional visit to a Samburu village. Overnight at Ashnil Samburu Camp.

itinerary.title: Samburu to Ol Pejeta
itinerary.description: Drive to Ol Pejeta Wildlife Sanctuary. Lunch at Serena Sweetwaters Tented Camp. Afternoon game drive at 15:30 hrs. See Big Five and Northern White Rhinos. Overnight at Serena Sweetwaters Tented Camp.

itinerary.title: Full day at Ol Pejeta
itinerary.description: Optional morning and afternoon game drives. Overnight at Serena Sweetwaters Tented Camp.

itinerary.title: Ol Pejeta to Lake Nakuru
itinerary.description: Drive 3½ hrs to Lake Nakuru. Lunch at Lake Nakuru Sopa Lodge. Afternoon game drive at 15:30 hrs. Spot rhinos, flamingoes, and Rothschild giraffe. Overnight at Nakuru Sopa Lodge.

itinerary.title: Lake Nakuru to Maasai Mara
itinerary.description: Early morning game drive, then depart for Maasai Mara (~5 hrs). Lunch and afternoon game drive at Ashnil Mara Camp. Overnight at Ashnil Mara Camp.

itinerary.title: Full day in Maasai Mara
itinerary.description: Morning and afternoon game drives. Optional full-day drive with packed lunch. Big Five and Great Migration viewing. Overnight at Ashnil Mara Camp.

itinerary.title: Full day in Maasai Mara
itinerary.description: Morning and afternoon game drives. Overnight at Ashnil Mara Camp.

itinerary.title: Maasai Mara to Diani Beach
itinerary.description: Early morning departure at 06:30 hrs. Flight to Diani (~1¼ hrs). Transfer to Swahili Beach Resort & SPA. Overnight at Swahili Beach Resort & SPA.

itinerary.title: Full day in Diani
itinerary.description: Optional activities: Chale Island tour, swimming with dolphins at Wasini Island, water sports. Overnight at Swahili Beach Resort & SPA.

itinerary.title: Full day in Diani
itinerary.description: Relax or optional excursions. Overnight at Swahili Beach Resort & SPA.

itinerary.title: Full day in Diani
itinerary.description: Relax or optional excursions. Overnight at Swahili Beach Resort & SPA.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Check out after lunch. Transfer to Diani Airstrip for flight to Nairobi at 15:30 hrs, arriving at 17:00 hrs. END OF SERVICE.

included: Accommodation on Full Board in all lodges, half board at Swahili Beach Resort
Exclusive use of safari Mini-Van (not shared)
Professional driver guide and pre-tour briefing
All park entrance fees and relevant taxes
Return air ticket Nairobi – Diani – Nairobi on Safarilink
Excursions to Wasini and Chale Islands
notIncluded: Personal expenses (travel insurance, laundry, phone calls, meals/drinks not indicated)

travelInfo.clothes: Bring mosquito repellent, sunscreen, hat, sunglasses, malaria medication. Early mornings and evenings can be cool; a sweater and trousers/jeans recommended.
travelInfo.food: Buffet meals at lodges, some set menus. All food prepared by professional chefs.

note: Berleen Safaris LTD reserves the right to vary the accommodations mentioned to a similar facility in circumstances beyond our control.
